  1. model

Uses of Package
model

Packages that use model
Package
Description
auxiliaries
 
controller
 
controller.contracts
 
model
 
view
 
view.dialogs
 
view.pages
 
view.panels
 
  • Classes in model used by auxiliaries
    Class
    Description
    Task
    Defines a single task, modelled with a title and additional details as well a completion status, priority, deadline and creation date.
    Workspace
    Defines a workspace that maintains multiple Checklist items while extending AbstractCollection to provide list tools, observability and serialization.
  • Classes in model used by controller
    Class
    Description
    Checklist
    Defines a checklist that can contain multiple Task items while extending AbstractCollection to provide list tools, observability and serialization.
    Task
    Defines a single task, modelled with a title and additional details as well a completion status, priority, deadline and creation date.
    Workspace
    Defines a workspace that maintains multiple Checklist items while extending AbstractCollection to provide list tools, observability and serialization.
  • Classes in model used by controller.contracts
    Class
    Description
    AbstractData
    Abstract base class for data models that support observation and serialization.
    Checklist
    Defines a checklist that can contain multiple Task items while extending AbstractCollection to provide list tools, observability and serialization.
    Task
    Defines a single task, modelled with a title and additional details as well a completion status, priority, deadline and creation date.
  • Classes in model used by model
    Class
    Description
    AbstractCollection
    Abstract data model that provides the tools to manage a collection of AbstractData items.
    AbstractData
    Abstract base class for data models that support observation and serialization.
    Checklist
    Defines a checklist that can contain multiple Task items while extending AbstractCollection to provide list tools, observability and serialization.
    Checklist.DisplayMode
     
    Task
    Defines a single task, modelled with a title and additional details as well a completion status, priority, deadline and creation date.
    Task.Priority
    Defines the priority levels a task can have.
